title: Sabo Reveals the Truth of the Levely
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Sabo, Unknown person #4, York, Unknown person #5, Imu, Unknown person #6 as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: King cobra, ruler of Arabasta...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What have you come to ask?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Perhaps I should start from the begin-ning...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As you are aware, the organization known as the world government was founded 800 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...when 20 different monarchs came together.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their families all promptly moved to Mariejois to live as one clan...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: referred to as the celestial dragons,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ones responsible for the creation of the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as such, they have ruled over their creation ever since.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Internally, the 20 were considered equal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and to ensure that no individual dictator would rise up from among them.

dialogue.speaker: Imu
dialogue.text: They installed the empty throne.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Each of them placed a weapon around the throne, to symbolize their vow to never try and sit upon it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At the same time, New Royal families were hand picked to rule the nations...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That the founders could no longer preside over. Those families are still in power to this day.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In order to ensure the smooth transition, all references mentioning the previous dynasty's reign...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were removed from each of the founders' respective home countries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With the sole exception of Arabasta....!! The monarch at the time was...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Queen Lili of House Nefertari. While her name was immortalized as one of the founding 20...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She did not stay to become a celestial dragon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Instead, she was to return to arabasta to continue her reign.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which is why the Nefertari family has con- tinued to act as sovereigns.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This also means that only 19 weapons were ever placed around the empty throne.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's all as you say... but what exactly is your point?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've scoured all of my kingdom's ancient texts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But as far as I can tell,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All known accounts chronicling the period after the void century have one thing in common...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: her name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Isn't mentioned once.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It appears Queen UI never made it home to arabasta...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the burden of ruling the country fell to her younger brother.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you have any record of what became of her...?

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
